roa.docketEntryComment: Court Orders Bench Warrant Permanently Stayed
Warrant - Bench Warrant Return 09/20/22 FTA COUMMUNITY JUSTICE COURT PROGRESS REPORT
PD MOTION  TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE PURSUANT TO PC 1538,5 FILED

/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/ACM/NTW60/VD: 02-09-22/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD:SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THEDEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD: THIS CASE IS REFERRED TOCJC FOR ASSESSMENT/TRANS POLK: FOR CJC ASSESSMENT ON 02-04-22 AT 1:30 P,M,/DOP/

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:02-09-22 (10TH)/X: THE 60TH CALENDAR DAY IS 03-29-22,/ACM/DEF: DEFENDANT MUST COMPLY WITH PREVIOUSLY ISSUED STAY AWAY ORDER AS A CONDITION OF RELEASEON ACM/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 90 MIN/
/CAL:CJC PRG RPT AND PTC/DEF:PRESENT VIA ZOOM/INTC/EMTERM/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:CJC PRG RPT AND PTC/DEF:PRESENT VIA ZOOM/INTC/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:CJC PRG RPT AND PTC/X:CASE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE QUIDACHAY APPEARING VIAZOOM/DEF:PRESENT VIA ZOOM/INTC/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:CJC PRG RPT AND PTC/X:CASE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE SING APPEARING VIA ZOOM/DEF:PRESENT VIA ZOOM/INTC/CONT/DOP/

/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:20000/BWNUM:1ST/CTORD:DO NOT CITE/X:2 OF 2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/
